name: Zhejiang Weixing Industrial Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Weixing Industrial Development Co., Ltd. engages in research and development, production, and sale of clothing accessories in China and internationally. Its products include buttons, zippers, metal parts, and other clothing accessories used in clothing, textile, garment, and other supporting industries. The company is based in Linhai, China. Zhejiang Weixing Industrial Development Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Weixing Group Co., Ltd.
